entries.title: [2026-06-24] Spawn adjustment and missing resources
entries.text:
PATCH NOTES

* Added missing resource files.
* Adjusted spawn radius in Metal Empire.
* Adjusted Caster role skills

| Skill | Before | After |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Magia Code: Protection | 99% Damage Reduction, 15s duration, 35s cooldown | 30% Damage Reduction, 5s duration, 70s cooldown |
| Magia Code: Omega | +50% Skill Damage, Cooldown Reduction (scales with INT), +20,000 Max DS | +70% Skill Damage, Cooldown Reduction (scales with INT), +20,000 Max DS |
| Magia Code: Dispell | Cleanse self, 5s cooldown | Cleanse self, 150s cooldown |
| Sprint | +800 Move Speed, 8s | +800 Move Speed, 12s |
| Magia Code: Ravage | +100% Skill Damage, 15s | No change |


Note: We will be launching a new event later this week and will continue making additional adjustments as needed.

entries.title: [2026-06-23] Metal Empire Hard modes
entries.text:
DIGITAL ODYSSEY PATCH NOTES

NEW CONTENT

• Added Ophanimon Falldown Mode Riding Mode item to the Cash Shop.

• Added New Digimon Effects

• Added Hard Mode versions of the following dungeons:

* MetalSeadramon
* WaruMonzaemon
* Pinocchimon
* Mugendramon


ADDITIONAL CONTENT

New Seals

• MetalSeadramon Seal

* +2.5% Block
* +3.0% HP

• Mugendramon Seal

* +6.0% Attack
* +5.0% Defense

• Puppetmon Seal

* +11.0% DS
* +2.0% HP


\
CHANGES

• Some rewards previously exclusive to Hard Mode have been moved to their Normal Mode counterparts. • Raid Timer no longer requires Membership to view raid spawn timers. • The teleport functionality remains a Membership-exclusive feature.


\
NEW ACCESSORIES

Dark Accessories can now be crafted through Zudomon \[Olympus\].

Crafting Cost 

• 10T

Available Accessories 

• Dark Ring 

• Dark Necklace 

• Dark Earrings 

• Dark Bracelet


Required Materials (per craft) 

• 1 Matching Corrupted Accessory 

• 50 Bound Dark DigiCore 

• 25 Bound Energized Dark DigiCore 

• 100 Overloaded Dark DigiCore 

• 5 Respective DarkDigicore


DarkDigicore Sources

• DarkDigicore: Golden Seadragon — MetalSeadramon (Hard) (3%) 

• DarkDigicore: Cursed Puppet — Pinocchimon (Hard) (3%) 

• DarkDigicore: Fullmetal Tyrant — Mugendramon (Hard) (3%) 

• DarkDigicore: Fiendish Clown — Currently unavailable


Material Drops

Dark DigiCore (Normal Mode Only) 

• Tankmon (20%) 

• MegaDramon (15%) 

• WaruMonzaemon (15%) 

• Mugendramon (15%)


Energized Dark DigiCore (Normal Mode Only)

• Tankmon (15%) 

• MegaDramon (10%) 

• WaruMonzaemon (10%) 

• Mugendramon (10%)


Overloaded Dark DigiCore 

• MetalSeadramon (Hard) (100%) 

• Pinocchimon (Hard) (100%) 

• Mugendramon (Hard) (100%) 

• Tankmon (Hard) (40%) 

• MegaDramon (Hard) (40%) 

• GigaDramon (Hard) (40%) 

• WaruMonzaemon (Hard) (40%)


\
Ring Data: Dark Seadragon

\n• MaxHP%: 5 – 15\n• MaxDS%: 5 – 12\n• AT%: 1 – 12\n• DE%: 1 – 14\n• Attribute Damage: 1 – 9\n• Block: 1 – 10\n• Evasion: 1 – 8\n• Skill Damage%: 0.5 – 10


Necklace Data: Dark Puppet

\n• MaxHP%: 2.5 – 15\n• MaxDS%: 2.5 – 12\n• AT%: 1 – 10\n• DE%: 1 – 14\n• Attack Speed: 1 – 7.5\n• Attribute Damage: 1 – 10\n• Accuracy: 1 – 10\n• Evasion: 1 – 10\n• Block: 1 – 10\n• Skill Damage%: 0.5 – 10


Earrings Data: Fullmetal Dark Tyrant

\n• MaxHP%: 1 – 15\n• AT%: 1 – 10\n• DE%: 1 – 14\n• Critical Damage: 1 – 10\n• Accuracy: 1 – 10\n• Evasion: 1 – 10\n• Block: 1 – 10\n• Skill Damage%: 0.5 – 10


Bracelet Data: Dark Clown

\n• MaxHP%: 1 – 15\n• MaxDS%: 1 – 15\n• AT%: 1 – 10\n• DE%: 1 – 10\n• Critical Damage: 1 – 10\n• Accuracy: 1 – 10\n• Block: 1 – 8\n• Evasion: 1 – 8\n• Skill Damage%: 0.5 – 10


\

\

CHANGES

• Raid Timer no longer requires Membership to view raid spawn timers. • The teleport functionality remains a Membership-exclusive feature.

CORRUPTED ACCESSORY QUESTS


Zudomon the Blacksmith on Olympos Island now offers quests that reward Character Bound Corrupted Accessory Data items. The items needs to be in inventory.

Available Quests 

• The Corrupted Seadragon → Ring Data: Corrupted Seadragon 

• The Corrupted Puppet → Necklace Data: Corrupted Puppet 

• The Corrupted Tyrant → Earrings Data: Corrupted Tyrant 

• The Corrupted Clown → Bracelet Data: Corrupted Clown


\
NOTES

• Corrupted Accessory quests only reward Character Bound accessory data. 

• Tradable Corrupted Accessories are obtained through a separate crafting option that creates accessory boxes. 

• Tradable Dark DigiCore and Energized Dark DigiCore can be converted into their Bound versions at Zudomon free of charge. 

• Dark Bracelet cannot currently be crafted because DarkDigicore: Fiendish Clown does not yet have a drop source.

* More drops will be added to Normal modes across Forest of the Marionette Instances and Metal Empire/UnderGround City instances shortly

* Fixed portals that were leading to unintended maps.
* Fixed an issue where some items were unintentionally becoming character-bound (CB).

entries.title: [2026-06-16] Skill Casting Bar
entries.text:
## New Feature: Skill Casting Bar

Skills that root your Digimon in place while casting now display a clear casting indicator above its head, making it easier to see exactly how long you will be locked in place.

* **Casting bar over your Digimon:** Appears automatically when using skills that prevent movement during casting, including Caster-role skills and skills with cast animations.
* **Live countdown timer:** A seconds readout next to the bar shows exactly how long remains before you can move again.
* **Draining progress bar:** The bar starts full and empties as the cast progresses, giving you a quick visual sense of timing.
* **Integrated with overhead bars:** Positioned just below the DS bar, matching the rest of your Digimon's overhead status display.
* **Shield-aware layout:** When a damage shield is active, the shield amount and timer automatically reposition to avoid overlapping the casting bar.

## Revamped UI: Trade Window

The player-to-player Trade Window has been rebuilt to match the game's modern themed interface.

* **Refreshed visual style:** The themed window body and panel headers replace the old textured chrome, bringing the Trade Window in line with the updated UI.
* **New button styling:** Close, OK, Cancel, Trade, and money buttons now use clean themed pill styling.
* **Clearer labels:** Trader name labels have been redrawn with the new text styling for improved readability.

**Unchanged core layout:** Trade item slots and the chat log remain unchanged.

## Combat Fixes

* **Fixed a high-power damage overflow issue:** Fixed a calculation error where damage could overflow and collapse to near-zero on high-power characters, causing both skills and basic attacks to hit for only a fraction of their real value.
* **Corrected affected damage cases:** This issue mainly affected Digimon with high Attack combined with skill-damage or crit-damage accessories.
* **Preserved intended accessory scaling:** Skill and basic attack damage now calculate correctly. Accessory Skill Damage % keeps its full value and continues to scale with enchantment and INT exactly as intended.\n
*  Adjusted skill damage calculations to improve overall damage scaling.


## General Changes

• Increased spawn density and adjusted respawn times for Digimon in Chaotic Space.

• Adjusted skill damage calculations to improve overall damage scaling.

entries.title: [2026-06-15] Patch 2
entries.text:
NEW MAP

• Chaotic Space has been added(Requires last quest in infinite mountain to enter).

* This map will be expanded over time with new areas, higher-level content, and additional Digimon.
* For now, it serves as a beginner-friendly zone.

NEW DIGIMON CONTENT

• Meicoomon Eggs can now be farmed in Chaotic Space.

• Numemon Eggs can now be farmed in Chaotic Space.

• Meicoomon Eggs are now available in the Cash Shop.

NOTE

• Numemon will receive a unique and powerful evolution line, fully obtainable through gameplay with no Cash Shop requirements.

SYSTEM CHANGES

• Riding Mode now requires the appropriate canonical riding items.

• Canonical riding items are available in the Cash Shop.

Seal Master UI

These updates are part of the ongoing UI polish pass focused on improving consistency, readability, and overall usability across the game.

entries.title: [2026-06-13] New AOE skill preview
entries.text:
# Patch Notes

## Improvements

### Skill AOE Preview Indicators

* Added new **Skill AOE Preview Indicators**.

You can now preview a skill's area of effect on the ground before using it. Hover over any area skill in your skill bar and its hit zone will be drawn directly in the world, making it easier to line up attacks, position support skills, and understand exactly what each skill will affect.

Preview indicators adapt based on the skill type:

* **Circular skills** display a ground circle.
  * Buffs and heals are centered on your Digimon.
  * Offensive skills are centered on your current target.
* **Rush skills** display a directional lane from your Digimon toward the target, showing the full path the charge will sweep through.

Indicator color now shows skill intent at a glance:

* 🔴 **Red** — damaging/offensive skills.
* 🟢 **Green** — heals, buffs, and other helpful skills.

Indicators use a clean, thin outline with a soft edge, subtle pulse, and smooth fade-in, keeping them easy to read without cluttering the screen. They also update in real time, following you and your target as movement changes.

A new option has been added under **Settings → Interface → Skill AOE Preview**:

* **On (hover)** — always show the preview while hovering a skill. Default option.
* **Ctrl + hover** — only show the preview while holding Ctrl, for a cleaner skill bar when previews are not needed.
* **Off** — disable Skill AOE Preview Indicators entirely.

### Quest Browser

* Added a quick quest view for **Limit Break Quests**.

When a Digimon reaches its level cap, its level label will appear in red. Clicking the red level label opens the related quest directly in the **Quest Browser**, making it easier to find the required **Limit Break Quest** and unlock further progression.

### Raid Damage Ranking UI

* Revamped the **Raid Damage Ranking** UI with improved theming.
* Improved the table layout for better readability.
* Improved ranking display and handling.

entries.title: [2026-06-12] The Devil Still Lingers
entries.text:
# Patch Notes

### General Changes

* Added new quest in Gennai - First Steps as a beginner boost quest.
* Removed ExV-Mon from Random DigiEggs.
* All V-Mon DigiEggs now hatch into the V-Dramon evolution line.
* Added a new option in Digitamamon to exchange Seals for Seal Exchange Tickets.
* Added Miracle, Fate, and Kindness to the Digivice reroll pool in the Andromon NPC.
* Fixed an issue where all Champion Digimon had their evolutions unlocked immediately upon hatching.
* Added an option to Zudomon NPC that allows you to turn your non-CB Dark DigiCores and Energized Dark DigiCores into CB ones.

### UI Improvements

#### Party Window

* Redesigned party member cards with a Digimon-focused layout.
* Removed the unused Tamer HP and DS bars from party entries.
* Enlarged Digimon HP and DS bars and added numeric HP/DS value displays for improved readability.
* Reorganized each party card into distinct **Header**, **Vitals**, and **Buffs** sections with visual dividers.
* Moved buff icons into a dedicated buff strip within the party card frame for cleaner presentation.
* Added a pulsing red warning frame when a party member's Digimon falls to **20% HP or lower**.
* Moved the party leader crown icon next to the voice chat indicator.
* Fixed an issue where the final party slot could not be selected.

### Crafting

* Promethean DigiAura can now be crafted through Zudomon.

### Server Continent Canyon

* Server Continent Canyon Story Mode has been converted into a Solo Dungeon.
* Rebalanced dungeon drops accordingly.
* Added additional rewards to the dungeon's drop table.
* Added a First Clear Reward for Story Mode.

### Main Quest Progression

* All Main Quest-related instanced boss fights and dungeons now require their intended entry requirements before access is granted.

### Raids & Rewards

* Added Seal Packs to World Raid rewards. Some of the packs contain old seals to help avoid excessive power progression.
* Added Weekly Quests that reward Dark Digicores and Energized Dark Digicores.

### Notes

* Further class readjustments will be made only when deemed absolutely necessary.


---

# Temporary Event — The Devil Still Lingers

**Duration:** June 12, 2026 – June 26, 2026

An old darkness stirs once more across File Island. Devimon and his loyal PicoDevimon swarms have returned, spreading Black Gears throughout the land in an attempt to reclaim dominion over the Digital World.

Speak with **Angemon — Warden of Hope** to participate.

### Event Features

* Devimon and PicoDemimon have appeared throughout File Island.
* Defeat event monsters to obtain **Cursed Shard Boxes** and **Black Gear**.
* Complete the daily quest to earn **Devimon's Sigil**.
* Exchange event currencies for exclusive rewards at Angemon's Shop.

### Daily Quest — The Devil Still Lingers

**Objective**

* Defeat 200 Devimon.
* Defeat 200 PicoDevimon.

**Rewards**

* Devimon's Sigil ×10
* Cursed Shard Box ×80
* Black Gear ×1000

### Event Currencies

**Black Gear**

* Dropped by Devimon and PicoDevimon throughout File Island.

**Devimon's Sigil**

* Obtained exclusively from the daily quest.

### Event Rewards

Rewards available include:

* Promethean DigiAura
* BM Random Box \[Event\]
* Mega Random Boxes
* Mercenary Slot Expansion
* Reinforced Digiclone Items
* Inventory and Archive Expansions
* Adventure Tamer Exchange
* Many Mercenary DigiEggs
* Various progression and customization items

> All event rewards and event box contents besides Digicore and Blue Lights are character-bound.

File Island needs you, Hero. Stand with Angemon and drive back the darkness.

entries.title: [2026-06-12] 🎨 UI Update: New Interface System and Themes
entries.text:
Hey Heroes,

This patch includes the first major wave of our UI rework. A big part of the interface has been rebuilt on a new system, and along with it we're introducing UI themes that let you change the look of the game's windows.

## The new UI

Windows that have been moved to the new system get a cleaner, more consistent look: redesigned panels, buttons, lists and scrollbars, sharper text, and better hover and click feedback. There are also some smaller quality-of-life improvements along the way, like the new money input in the Market that lets you type Tera, Mega and Bit amounts directly in one place.

So far, the following windows have been updated:

* Market
* Inventory extensions (Base, Seal and Evolution grids)
* Quick Slot bars
* Tamer, Digimon and Target HUD, including the X-Antibody gauge
* Tamer Status and Digimon Status windows
* Quest windows and the Quest Helper
* Guild and Community windows
* Mail
* Friend List
* Options
* Digimon Archive and Achievements
* HUD toggles (Auto-Heal, Magnetic, Party Matching)

Not everything is converted yet. Some windows still use the old UI and will be updated in future patches, one wave at a time, until the whole interface is on the new system.

## UI Themes

You can now change the color scheme of the entire updated UI. Pick a theme in the Options window and every updated window switches to match. Your selection is saved and restored when you log in.

**Free themes, available to everyone:**

* Market (the new default navy and gold look)
* Slate
* Teal
* Emerald

**Membership themes:**

Players with an active Membership also get access to:

* Black
* Obsidian
* Nebula
* Pink

**Coming later:**

More themes will be added over time and will become obtainable in upcoming updates through event rewards, ranking rewards and Cash Shop premium packs.

## Feedback

This rework is an ongoing project. If something looks off in one of the updated windows, or you have ideas for theme colors you'd like to see, let us know on Discord. Your feedback helps us decide which windows to tackle next.

Thanks for playing!

entries.title: [2026-06-11] UI Modernization Begins
entries.text:
# Patch Notes


> **TL;DR:** Inventory, Warehouse & Extra Inventory have moved to our new UI system, and you can now **resize and scale** them.

We've started migrating interface to a new UI engine. The legacy UI limited what we could build; the new system unlocks resizing, scaling, and more customization features down the road. We're migrating window by window, starting with the ones you use most.

## Changes

* Inventory, Warehouse & Extra Inventory migrated to the new UI
* Added resize and scaling support to Inventory and Warehouse

## Known Issues

* As this is a new system, visual glitches may occur, report anything odd.


---

*More windows will move to the new style in upcoming patches.*

# Patch Notes

### Improvements

* improved some UIs list perfomance ( Quest Browser )
* Polished Market System UI

### Fixes

* Fixed several client crashes;
* Fixed issue where FPS dropped with some UIs open;

* Fixed tooltips not rendering correctly.

### Season Pass

* Added rewards for the new Season Pass.

# Patch Notes

* Adjusted drop rates for Dark DigiCore and Energized Dark DigiCore in Disunity.

### Drop Rate Adjustments



| Item | Rate | Quantity |
|------|------|----------|
| Dark DigiCore | 2%   | 1        |
| Energized Dark DigiCore | 1%   | 1        |

* \

entries.title: 2026-06-01 Client Update
entries.text:
# Patch Notes

### New Features

* Added **Exclusive Inventory Expansion** to the Cash Shop.

### Bug Fixes

* Fixed HP and DS overflow issues.

### Client Updates

* The game client has been upgraded to **64-bit**.
* The **DirectX 9 (DX9) client** is no longer supported and will no longer function.

entries.title: 2026-06-01 Hotfix
entries.text:
### Bug Fixes

* Fixed an issue causing corrupted accessory having more slots

entries.title: 2026-06-01 Hotfix
entries.text:
### Drop Rate Adjustments

Fixed incorrect drop rates for Cherrymon (Normal).

| Item | Rate | Qty |
|------|------|-----|
| Dark DigiCore | 3%   | 1   |
| Energized Dark DigiCore | 1%   | 1   |

* \

# Patch Notes

### Balance Adjustments

* Readjusted Bit drops in Spiral Mountain.
* Readjusted monster HP in Metal Empire and Underground City to help prevent economy inflation.
  * Additional loot adjustments are planned for future updates.

### DRP Adjustments

DRP has been added to the following instances:

| Instance | DRP |
|----------|-----|
| Army of Steel | 5000 |
| Twins of Destruction | 3300 |
| Evil Plushie | 3500 |
| Fullmetal Tyrant | 3300 |
| Dragon Dimension | 6000 |

entries.title: 2026-05-30 Hotfix
entries.text:
# Hotfix Patch Notes

* Added a new quest to **Minervamon** that rewards **1,000 Tokens** upon completing the Labours questline.
* Fixed missing crafting options from **Mercurymon**.
* Added **Backup Disks** back to the reward pool of **SCC**.

entries.title: 2026-05-30 Adjustments
entries.text:
# Patch Notes

## Balance Adjustments

* Readjusted stat gains from Seals.
* Readjusted World Raid HP and damage output.
* Readjusted World Raid respawn time to **3 hours**.
* Readjusted World Raid drop rates:
  * 10% chance to obtain **4x Olympian Data Fragments**
  * 15% chance to obtain **10x Chrome Digizoid Shards**
  * 5% chance to obtain **1x Olympian Data Core**
  * 5% chance to obtain **1x Chrome Digizoid**
* Readjusted open-world monster stats in **Metal Empire** and **Underground City**.
* Increased the drop rate of **Earrings Data: Fullmetal Tyrant** from **10%** to **30%**.
* Fixed **Dexmon's ASB**.

## Spiral Mountain (Normal Mode) Drop Adjustments

### Metal Empire / Underground City Instances

* Chrome Digizoid — **15%** (1x) *(Tankmon Instance Only)*
* Dark Digicore — **15%** (1–2x) *(Tankmon: 20%)*
* Energized Dark Digicore — **10%** (1x) *(Tankmon: 15%)*
* Tokens per clear:
  * Standard Instances: **1 Token**
  * Tankmon Instance: **2 Tokens**

### Forest of the Marionette Instances

* Dark Digicore — **7%** (1–2x)
* Energized Dark Digicore — **5%** (1x)

### MetalSeadramon

* Dark Digicore — **4%** (1–2x)
* Energized Dark Digicore — **2%** (1x)

## Examon Instance

* **Olympian Token** — 100% (50x)
* **Examon Seal** — 10% (2–5x)
* **Chrome Digizoid Shards** — 10% (5x)
* **Olympian Data Fragment** — 10% (2x)
* **Olympian Data Core** — 3% (1x)
* **Chrome Digizoid** — 3% (1x)

## New Additions

* Added **Dark Masters Tokens** to all **Metal Empire** and **Underground City** Normal Mode instances.

## Crafting

New crafting options have been added to the **Zudomon NPC**:

* **15 Dark Masters Tokens** → **1 Dark Digicore**
* **30 Dark Masters Tokens** → **1 Energized Dark Digicore**
* Readjusted the crafting cost for CB and Tradable Accessories

entries.title: 2026-05-29 hotfix 3
entries.text:
* Fixed MugenDramon loot table
* Reverted HT seals to flat value temporarily
* Readjust on DE seals temporarily

entries.title: 2026-05-29 hotfix 2
entries.text:
* Fixed Xuanwumon DigiEgg.
* Reduced raid boss HP.

entries.title: 2026-05-29 hotfix
entries.text:
## Additional Changes & Fixes

* Fixed issues with the **Cash Shop**
* Fixed **Raid Boss monster sizes**
* Added **Exclusive Inventory Expansion** to the **Cash Shop**

## New Feature

### Group Finder (Beta)

The **Group Finder (Beta)** system has been added. You can access it through the button located **underneath the minimap**.

# Update - Metal Empire

## New Maps & Main Quests

* **Metal Empire**
* **Underground City**


## New Instance / Boss Fights

* **Tankmon Dungeon** *(Story / Normal)*
* **Megadramon / Gigadramon** Dual Boss Fight *(Story / Normal)*
* **Warumonzaemon** Boss Fight *(Story / Normal)*
* **Mugendramon** Boss Fight *(Story / Normal)*

**Hard versions will be added shortly.**

DRP will be added weekly reset

## New World Raids

* **Goatmon**
* **Vikaralamon**
* **Sukamon**
* **Crowmon**
* **Vajramon**
* **AncientTrojamon**
* **Dobermon**
* **Cerberumon**

Each new Raid Boss drops **exclusive rewards** and **rare crafting materials**, including the **Olympian Data Core**.

## New Equipment

### Earring Data

* **Fullmetal Tyrant**
* **Corrupted Series**

### Olympian Tier (R4) - Tamer Gear *(Class 5 Epic)*

**Clothing Set (36 items total)** 6 equipment slots × 6 stat variants *(A–F)*

**Equipment Slots:**

* Cap
* Headset
* Vest
* Pants
* Gloves
* Boots

### Olympian Data Core

A **rare drop from World Raids**, required as a crafting material for **all Olympian (R4) tier items**.


---

## Digimon Release

* **Xuanwumon** *(MEGA)*
* **Z'D Garurumon** *(Gabumon Line)*
* **Death-X-Mon**


---

## New Quest Chain: The 12 Labours

### Rewards

* **1,000 Olympian Tokens**
* **7-Day Magnetic ID**
* Olympian Data Core
* Chrome Digizoid


## New Seals added to Digitamamon Exchange


## Seals were rebalanced to Percentage based

* Dual Stats will be added shortly.


\
**More content will be added shortly.**

## Graphics Update

### Renderer

* Upgraded the client from **DirectX 9** to **DirectX 11**
* Replaced the legacy **Blur** post-processing effect with a new **Bloom** effect
* Added **Rim Lighting** for improved silhouette definition
* Added **Cel Shading** for a cleaner, more stylized cartoon appearance
* Reworked the **Outline Effect** to better complement the new cartoon rendering style

### New Graphics Settings

The following sliders have been added to the graphics settings, allowing you to customize the visual experience to your preference:

* **Bloom Intensity**
* **Sharpness**
* **Rim Lighting**
* **Cel Shading**
* **Outline Thickness**

### Compatibility

A **DirectX 9** client version will remain available as a fallback option for players who may experience compatibility or performance issues with the new renderer.

### Behind the Scenes

This update also includes major improvements to our internal workflow, helping us deliver future content, expansions, and updates more efficiently.

More new features and content are coming this Friday stay tuned!
* Event Quest in Culumon has been deactivated.
* Adjusted spawn positions in **Server Continent Canyon(Normal)**. Monster spawns are now arranged in a more linear pattern.

# Patch Notes


***********************************************************************************************

## NOTICES

* Past summons in Babel will be re-enabled until the next releases arrive.

### Upcoming Releases

* Xuanwumon
* Z'D Garurumon
* Death-X-mon

### Banner Changes

* Upcoming banners will include 2 extra BM items.
* The pity reward system will be changed to a selectable ticket that allows players to choose the item they want.

If this system works well and players enjoy it, it may continue to be used for future banners.


---

## Next Content Update Schedule

* The next content update is scheduled for Friday the 29th.

We are taking a bit longer than usual to release new content because we want to ensure everything is properly tested and delivered in a polished state. We will keep you updated.

Thank you for your patience.



***********************************************************************************************


## New Content

### New Player Support Quest 2

* Added a new **Player Support Quest 2** in Gennai (Village of the Beginning).
* Rewards include:
  * 21 Evoluters
  * 5 Riding Modes
  * 3-Day Random Magnetic ID


---

## Bug Fixes & Adjustments

### Devimon & VenomVamdemon

* Fixed Devimon and VenomVamdemon F3 AoE issues.

### Champion Digimon Skill Unlock Requirements

* Changed the level requirements to unlock skills for:
  * Kiwimon
  * Baihumon
  * Deputymon
  * Other Champion Digimon without a Rookie form

### Belphemon

* Adjusted Belphemon skill gains per level and F2 cooldown to better match the performance of other Tank Digimon.
* Changed Belphemon Rage Mode model.


\

---

## Sinduramon Changes

### F4 Effect Changes

Sinduramon F4 now:

* Reduces damage taken by 10%
* Increases Max HP by 360 (+76 per Skill Level)
* Increases DE by 27 (+6 per Skill Level)
* Duration: 15 seconds

### F5 Effect Changes

Sinduramon F5 now:

* Increases Attack Speed by 12%
* Increases Critical Damage by 5% (+1% per Skill Level)
* Increases Skill Damage by 3% (+1% per Skill Level)
* Duration: 15 seconds


---

## Gomamon Line Rework

### Description Fixes

* Fixed F4 descriptions for:
  * Gomamon
  * Ikkakumon
  * Zudomon
  * Vikemon

### F4 Reworks

#### Gomamon — Tidewall Formation

* Grants a Shield of 200 (+30 per Skill Level)
* Increases party Evasion by 3% (+1.5% per Skill Level)
* Duration: 20 seconds

#### Ikkakumon — Avalanche Aegis

* Grants a Shield of 600 (+85 per Skill Level)
* Increases party Evasion by 4% (+2% per Skill Level)
* Duration: 20 seconds

#### Zudomon — Vulcan's Bulwark

* Grants a Shield of 1,100 (+145 per Skill Level)
* Increases party Evasion by 5% (+2.5% per Skill Level)
* Duration: 20 seconds

#### Vikemon — Frostforged Wall

* Grants a Shield of 2,500 (+310 per Skill Level)
* Increases party Evasion by 6% (+3% per Skill Level)
* Duration: 20 seconds

### Additional Gomamon Line Adjustments

* Fixed Gomamon line F4 Shield values being far too small relative to Tank HP at each evolution stage.
* Lv10 Shield values now sit at roughly 10% of a Tank's Lv90, Size 120% HP at the corresponding stage.
* Fixed Gomamon line F4 Evasion scaling being too weak.
* Scaling now ranges from:
  * 1.5% per Skill Level at Rookie
  * Up to 3% per Skill Level at Mega
* Standardized Vikemon F4 duration to 20 seconds.


---

## Fujinmon Changes

* Increased Fujinmon F1, F2, and F3 damage.

### Fujinmon F5 Rework

Fujinmon F5 now:

* Increases Skill Damage by 5% (+2% per Skill Level)
* Grants 15% Cooldown Reduction
* Duration: 30 seconds


---

## Damage Increases

Increased F3 damage for:

* GigaSeadramon
* AncientTroiamon
* BlitzGreymon
* JumboGamemon


\
## Dungeon Adjustments

* Readjusted **DRP** for **Cherrymon (Hard)** to **6,500 base**.

Here's a cleaned-up and properly formatted patch note version:

# Hotfix May 16, 2026

## Role & Skill Fixes

* Fixed issues with Ranged DPS role skills.
* Added a small cast time to Role Skills to prevent unintended Auto Attack cancel interactions.

## Digimon Adjustments

* Changed **Dorugoramon's F5 effect**:
  * Now increases **Critical Damage by 2% (+2% per Skill Level)**.
  * Now increases **Skill Damage by 2% (+2% per Skill Level)**.
  * Duration: **20 seconds**.
* Added **INT scaling** to **Lucemon Satan Mode**.
* Fixed **Beelzemon BM** animation delay.
* Fixed **Meramon F4** animation delay.
* Fixed **Meramon F3** not dealing AoE damage.
* Fixed **Mojyamon**, who now properly functions as a **Ranged DPS**.
* Fixed **AncientTroiamon F5** healing not scaling properly.
* Fixed **BlackSaintGalgomon F4** range issue and changed it to deal **AoE damage around the target**.
* Increased **Valdurmon F1** damage to be more in line with other healers.
* Increased **Valdurmon F2** damage to be more in line with other healers.
* Reduced **Valdurmon F2 (Aurora Undulation)** cooldown from **8.4s → 7.5s**.
* Reduced **Craniamon F2** cooldown to match other Tanks.
* Reduced **BelialVamdemon F3** cooldown to **5.8 seconds**.

## Dungeon & Boss Adjustments

* Reduced **Disunity Bosses' evasion**.
* Changed the **Disunity map**, and boss aggro now works properly.
* Fixed **Disunity OCS/NCS** to match the current versions dropped in **MDG**.
* Fixed boss monster behavior in **Disunity / Puppet Master**.
* Increased **mob eyesight** in **Cherrymon/Jureimon Hard Mode**.
* Changed **Cherrymon/Jureimon Hard Mode loot table**:
  * Fruits have been moved from mobs to the **Dungeon Boss**.
* **Pinocchimon (Hard Mode)** felt lonely because some players avoided his friends, so he now properly invites them to the party.
* **Ring Data: Golden Seadragon** now has increased **DE** values.
  * A **reroll is required** to obtain the updated option.


\
* Added new **DigiEggs** to the loot tables of their respective evolutio lines:
  * **Floramon**
  * **Gizamon**
  * **Syakomon**
  * **Swimmon**
  * **Tsukaimon**
  * **Armadimon**
  * **Lopmon**


## World Boss Adjustments

* Increased **Neptunemon World Boss HP**.
* Added **Mysterious Odyssey DigiEgg - Omega** to the **Neptunemon World Boss** loot pool.

# Patch Notes  May 14, 2026

## Important Notice

* All Seals will eventually be changed from flat values to percentage-based stats once testing is complete.
* We are also planning to release many more new Seals in future updates.

## Fixes & Improvements

* Fixed an issue preventing players from joining parties when tamer names contained non-default characters.
* Evolution items can now be used directly from the Extra Inventory.
* Crafting Materials can now be used directly from the Extra Inventory.

## Additions

* Added **Neptunemon** as a permanent World Raid in **Olympos Festival Island**.
* Added loot rewards to the **Neptunemon World Raid**.
  * About World Raids: Each World Raid boss has a single, server-wide HP pool that is shared across every channel. Damage dealt by any player on any channel is subtracted from the same pool, and the boss dies once that global pool reaches zero, there is no per-channel instance. Loot eligibility is based on your contribution to that shared fight, so coordinating across channels does not split the boss into multiple copies
* Added new items to spend **Olympos Tokens** at the **Mercurymon NPC** in **Olympos Festival Island**.
* Added **Mid Data Exchange** to the **Zudomon NPC** in **Olympos Festival Island**.
* **Olympos Tokens** are now tradable.
* Added **Goggles** to the **Disunity Instance**.
* Added **Hard Mode** to the **Cherrymon/Jureimon Dungeon**.

## UI Changes

* Inventory and Warehouse now display the number of occupied slots.
* The **Seals Master UI** can now filter activated Seals.
* The chat bar now includes an emoji picker.

## Dungeon Ranking Points

* **500 DRP**  Lord of the Deep Forest (Normal)
* **7,200 DRP**  Lord of the Deep Forest (Hard)
* **900 DRP**  Disunity (Normal)
* **2,000 DRP**  Disunity (Hard)
* **900 DRP**  Metallic Avenger (Normal)
* **2,000 DRP**  Metallic Avenger (Hard)
* **1,200 DRP**  The Puppet Master (Normal)
* **2,500 DRP**  The Puppet Master (Hard)

## Additional Notices

**Notice:** We are aware that some Digimon, such as **Lucemon**, **Baihumon**, and **Terriermon**, currently do not have farmable DigiEggs. We will gradually introduce them in a way that maintains game balance and does not negatively impact players.

**Notice 2:** All equipment currently available in the game will receive further upgrades in future updates.

# Patch Notes — Forest of Marionette Update

## New Content

* Added **Forest of Marionette**
* Added **Jureimon Boss Instance**
  * Hard Mode will be added tomorrow
* Added **Disunity Instance** (*WarGreymon & MetalGarurumon*)
* Added **MetalEtemon Instance**
  * Drops **Keyrings of the Chosen Children**
* Added **Pinocchimon Instance**
  * Drops **Necklace Data: Cursed Puppet** *(Character Bound on Normal / Tradable on Hard)*
* Added a **Quest through Culumon** *(Olympos Festival Island)* that allows players to obtain **one of the three Digimon released today**

## Cash Shop

* Added **Nameplates**
* Added **Guaranteed Packs** for the following Digimon:
  * **Lucemon Satan Mode** *(Hybrid)*
  * **Baihumon** *(Melee DPS)*
  * **BlackSaintGalgomon** *(Ranged DPS)*

## System & Quality of Life

* **Auto Attack** no longer requires skill canceling to move during attack animations
* Client now supports **multi-language input**
* **Guild EXP** is now being added correctly
* You can now **hold Ctrl and click a player's name** to automatically **copy it to your clipboard**

## Guild Contribution Changes

Guild contribution tasks have been adjusted as follows:

* **Raid Monster Kill** → 10 Points
* **Quest Completion** → 5 Points
* **Hatch an Egg** → 30 Points
* **100 Monster Kills** → 5 Points
* **Dungeon Clear (Hard & Extreme)** → 25 Points
* **Transcendence** → 1000 Points

## Notice

* **Jureimon/Cherrymon Hard Mode** and the **Olympos Token Vendor** will be added tomorrow.
* Some icons are still missing. We will continue uploading them over time, and **no server restart will be required** for these updates.

entries.title: 2026-05-11 Hotfix
entries.text:
### Fixes

* Fixed Taichi missing in Forest of the Beginning

## Patch Notes — May 11, 2026

### Event

* The Marsmon Event has ended. The boss will remain available for fun, but rewards are no longer obtainable.

### Additions

* Added Digimon Archive NPCs across all File Island maps.
* Added Digimon Archive NPCs across all Server Continent maps.
* Added Digimon Archive NPCs across all Odaiba area maps.

### Fixes

* Fixed an issue where Magia Code Protection was not activating its effect.

entries.title: Patch Notes-2
entries.text:
# Patch Notes — May 8, 2026

## Progression & World Adjustments

* Story Mode is no longer restricted to Single Player only.
* EXP rewards and boss stats have been readjusted across instanced content.

# Patch Notes  May 8, 2026

## Visual Updates

* Added new skill icons for the following Digimon:
  * Dukemon Crimson Mode
  * UlforceV-dramon
  * Seraphimon
  * Lilithmon
  * JumboGamemon
  * Ophanimon
  * TigerVespamon
  * VictoryGreymon


---

## Digimon Balance Changes

### Hackmon

* Changed F5 effect:
  * Increases Critical Damage by 5% (+2% per Skill Level)
  * Increases Critical Rate by 10% (+2% per Skill Level)
  * Duration: 20 seconds
* Adjusted stats to properly fit a Rookie Melee role

### BaoHackmon

* Changed F5 effect:
  * Increases Critical Damage by 5% (+2% per Skill Level)
  * Increases Skill Damage by 10% (+3% per Skill Level)
* Adjusted stats to properly fit a Champion Melee role

### Seadramon

* Changed F4 effect:
  * Restores 5% MaxDS
  * Restores 450 HP (+42 per Skill Level)
  * Reduces damage taken by 4% for 20 seconds
* Changed F5 effect:
  * Restores 230 HP per tick
  * Reduces damage taken by 25%
  * Gains a Shield of 1050 (+98 per Skill Level)
  * Duration: 15 seconds

### MegaSeadramon

* Changed F4 effect:
  * Restores 5% MaxDS
  * Restores 600 HP (+56 per Skill Level)
  * Reduces damage taken by 4% for 20 seconds
* Changed F5 effect:
  * Restores 360 HP per tick
  * Reduces damage taken by 25%
  * Gains a Shield of 1650 (+154 per Skill Level)
  * Duration: 15 seconds


---

## Dungeon & Combat Adjustments

### Marsmon Instance

* Reduced Story, Normal, and Hard Mode Evasion to improve consistency for Digimon that rely on auto attacks
* Adjusted instance rewards
* Increased rewards for Normal and Hard Mode

### MetalSeadramon <Normal>

* Re-tuned encounter damage output
* The fight now properly requires Tank and Support roles


---

## System Fixes

* Fixed ALL chipsets not being applied correctly to all families
* Fixed buffs remaining active after evolutions
* Fixed Gazimon in Odaiba not dropping DigiEggs
* Added a buff to Story Mode Instances providing +300% AT +300% Skill Damage + 300% DE


---

## Progression & World Adjustments

* Adjusted Story Mode boss EXP gain up to VenomVamdemon Boss
* Adjusted Story Mode boss stats
* Adjusted EXP gain and stats for several mobs in Odaiba maps
* Added ChaosDramon to the BlackAgumon line


---

# Note

We are aware of the issues currently affecting the game, and we truly appreciate everyone taking the time to report bugs and provide feedback.

Alongside fixing these issues, we are also continuing to implement new content while making sure everything is properly tested before release.

Forest of Marionette is nearly ready. The update will include 4 new instances, and we are currently finalizing the mechanics and encounter systems.

A final round of testing will take place on Monday, as we are unable to properly schedule testers during the weekend. If no major issues are found, the update is planned to release on Tuesday.

We want to keep delivering new content consistently, but we would rather take the time to do things properly than repeat the same mistakes from the past.

As many of you already know, our goal is not to simply recreate things 1:1. We are rebuilding and redesigning as much as possible in our own way, including systems, mechanics, and features, to create a more unique, polished, and enjoyable experience overall.

We will continue doing our best to deliver updates as quickly as possible while keeping quality and gameplay experience as the priority.

Thank you all for the support, patience, and understanding.

Enjoy the final 2 days of the event.

entries.title: Hotfix 2026-05-05
entries.text:

**Fixes**

entries.title: Hotfix

* Fixed Reinforced Clone Cube not being scannable

  \

We will continue pushing additional fixes as soon as possible. Unfortunately, the rest of the dev team is currently unavailable, but work will resume shortly.

Thank you for your patience.

Patch Notes — April 20, 2026
